description: Create an interactive navigation menu for a kiosk presentation using the file 'orientation_kiosk.odp'. On Slide 1 ('Welcome to Acme Corp'), add three rectangle shapes labeled 'History', 'Benefits', and 'Policies' that link to Slide 2 ('Our History'), Slide 4 ('Employee Benefits'), and Slide 6 ('Company Policies') respectively. On Slide 6 ('Company Policies'), add a 'Home' button that links back to Slide 1. Save the final presentation as 'orientation_kiosk_interactive.odp' in the same directory.
